memoryArtifacts.headline: Jock o’ Scurdarg
memoryArtifacts.description:
Traditionally, John of Scurdargue is said to have been a man of prodigous strength, ferocious appearance, and a great hunter. His father and he come down to us in an old rhyme...

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gordon of Scurdargue於大約1375年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，他的父親Sir John Gordon61歲，母親Elizabeth Cruickshanks47歲。他於1400年與Hainault Macleod, of Harris在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1440年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年67歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gordon of Scurdargue于大约1375年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，他的父亲Sir John Gordon61岁，母亲Elizabeth Cruickshanks47岁。他于1400年与Hainault Macleod, of Harris在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1440年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年67岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Gordon of Scurdargue was born about 1375, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Gordon, was 61 and his mother, Elizabeth Cruickshanks, was 47. He married Hainault Macleod, of Harris in 1400, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1440, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 67, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gordon of Scurdargue est né environ 1375, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Gordon, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cruickshanks, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Hainault Macleod, of Harris en 1400, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1440, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Gordon of Scurdargue um 1375 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Gordon 61 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cruickshanks 47. Er hat 1400 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland Hainault Macleod, of Harris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1440 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Gordon of Scurdargue è nato il circa 1375 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Gordon, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cruickshanks, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Hainault Macleod, of Harris nel 1400, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1440, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gordon of Scurdargueが約1375年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Gordonは61歳，母Elizabeth Cruickshanksは47歳であった。1400年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでHainault Macleod, of Harrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1440年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで67歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gordon of Scurdargue(이)가 대략 1375년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Gordon(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cruickshanks(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1400년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 Hainault Macleod, of Harris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1440년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Gordon of Scurdargue nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Gordon, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cruickshanks, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Hainault Macleod, of Harris em 1400, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1440, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gordon of Scurdargue родился около 1375 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Gordon было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cruickshanks, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Hainault Macleod, of Harris в 1400 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1440 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия.

sm.about 1375–about 1440: e tusa o le 1375–e tusa o le 1440

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Gordon of Scurdargue nació aproximadamente 1375, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Gordon, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cruickshanks, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Hainault Macleod, of Harris en 1400, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1440, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
